context.projectOverview: Sprint 20 — highest-risk Tier 3 sprint. Adds bober-deployer subagent (executes; not read-only) + bober.deploy skill + change-management gates + pipeline.allowAutopilotRiskyActions + ChangeEntry-at-execution recording. Unconditional gate: risky actions ALWAYS invoke a non-noop mechanism unless allowAutopilotRiskyActions=true.

completedSprints.title: Careful-flow plumbing
completedSprints.summary: Checkpoint module at src/orchestrator/checkpoints/ with mechanism registry. Has getCheckpointMechanismFor(checkpointId, config, fallback) for per-checkpoint resolution.

completedSprints.title: Audit trail
completedSprints.summary: Append-only JSONL audit pattern used by sprint 19.

completedSprints.title: Mode + mechanism config
completedSprints.summary: pipeline.mode, pipeline.checkpointMechanism, checkpointOverrides — Sprint 20 adds pipeline.allowAutopilotRiskyActions to this section.

completedSprints.title: bober-diagnoser
completedSprints.summary: Pattern for read-only subagent (deployer is the NOT-read-only complement).

completedSprints.title: Observability MCP slots
completedSprints.summary: obs__<provider>__<tool> namespace + mergeObsTools. Deployer spawn pattern can mirror this.

completedSprints.title: bober.runbook skill
completedSprints.summary: Templates the hard-gate + rollback-cascade language. Deployer skill mirrors.

completedSprints.title: Incident timeline
completedSprints.summary: src/incident/types.ts ChangeEntrySchema (inverse REQUIRED). src/incident/timeline.ts appendChange (writes both changelog.jsonl AND timeline.jsonl in mutex). Sprint 20 uses these.
